title: Check It Out, I'm in a House
description: A mod that adds items related to that one Toby Fox post
body:
Adds carpet, house-like carpet, i'm, i'm house, and house

Also adds a Carpet music disc

 

 

Credits to Note Block Studio, IronInvoker47 for MIDI, Toby Fox for inspiration and post

[carpet](https://bsky.app/profile/tobyfox.undertale.com/post/3l7gxx7iajb2a)
